SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-26-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVEY, ALAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RECREATION & PARK DEPT. THE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT THE DEFENDANT'S ACT OF INCREASING BERTHING FEES AT THE MARINA WEST HARBOR ON APRIL 1, 2013, WAS ARBITRARY, CAPRICIOUS OR WITHOUT REASONABLE OR RATIONAL BASIS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,365.29 FILED BY CAVEY, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RECREATION & PARK DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RECREATION & PARK DEPT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-21-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
